cases.passage: The Indian government has launched a new digital literacy program to educate citizens about online safety and cyber security. As part of this program, a team of experts has been tasked with creating a website to provide information and resources on how to stay safe online. The team is using a structured approach to problem-solving, involving a series of steps to identify the problem, gather requirements, design a solution, implement the solution, and test it. They are also using a programming language to develop the website. What is the primary goal of the team's structured approach to problem-solving?

questions.q: What is the primary goal of the team's structured approach to problem-solving?
opts: (A) To develop a website quickly
(B) To provide information and resources on online safety and cyber security
(C) To use a programming language to develop the website
(D) To identify and solve the problem effectively
questions.explanation: The primary goal of the team's structured approach to problem-solving is to identify and solve the problem effectively.

questions.q: What is the structured approach to problem-solving involving?
opts: (A) Analysis, Design, Implementation, Testing
(B) Gathering requirements, Designing a solution, Implementing the solution, Testing it
(C) Identifying the problem, Gathering requirements, Designing a solution, Implementing the solution
(D) Using a programming language to develop the website
questions.explanation: The structured approach to problem-solving involves identifying the problem, gathering requirements, designing a solution, and implementing the solution.

questions.q: What is the purpose of the team using a programming language to develop the website?
opts: (A) To make the website more user-friendly
(B) To make the website more secure
(C) To make the website more efficient
(D) To develop the website quickly
questions.explanation: The team is using a programming language to develop the website quickly.

questions.q: What is the Indian government's new digital literacy program aimed at?
opts: (A) Educating citizens about online safety and cyber security
(B) Providing information and resources on how to stay safe online
(C) Developing a website to provide information and resources on online safety and cyber security
(D) Using a programming language to develop a website
questions.explanation: The Indian government's new digital literacy program is aimed at educating citizens about online safety and cyber security.

questions.q: What is the outcome of the team's structured approach to problem-solving?
opts: (A) A website that is easy to use
(B) A website that is secure
(C) A website that is efficient
(D) A solution that is effective
questions.explanation: The outcome of the team's structured approach to problem-solving is a solution that is effective.

cases.passage: A local school is planning to develop a mobile app to help students manage their assignments and deadlines. The school has a limited budget for the project, and the team responsible for developing the app must ensure that it is developed within the given constraints. The team has decided to use a structured approach to problem-solving, involving a series of steps to identify the problem, gather requirements, design a solution, implement the solution, and test it. They are also considering using open-source software to reduce costs. What is the primary advantage of using open-source software for the project?

questions.q: What is the primary advantage of using open-source software for the project?
opts: (A) It is more expensive than proprietary software
(B) It is more secure than proprietary software
(C) It is free and can be modified as needed
(D) It is easier to use than proprietary software
questions.explanation: The primary advantage of using open-source software for the project is that it is free and can be modified as needed.

questions.q: What is the primary goal of the team's structured approach to problem-solving?
opts: (A) To develop a mobile app quickly
(B) To provide a solution that meets the requirements
(C) To use open-source software to reduce costs
(D) To identify and solve the problem effectively
questions.explanation: The primary goal of the team's structured approach to problem-solving is to identify and solve the problem effectively.

questions.q: What is the outcome of the team's structured approach to problem-solving?
opts: (A) A mobile app that is easy to use
(B) A mobile app that is secure
(C) A mobile app that meets the requirements
(D) A solution that is effective
questions.explanation: The outcome of the team's structured approach to problem-solving is a mobile app that meets the requirements.

questions.q: What is the team responsible for developing the app trying to ensure?
opts: (A) That the app is developed quickly
(B) That the app is easy to use
(C) That the app is developed within the given constraints
(D) That the app is secure
questions.explanation: The team responsible for developing the app is trying to ensure that the app is developed within the given constraints.

questions.q: What is the series of steps that the team is following to develop the app?
opts: (A) Identify the problem, design a solution, implement the solution, test it
(B) Gather requirements, design a solution, implement the solution, test it
(C) Identify the problem, gather requirements, design a solution, implement the solution
(D) Design a solution, implement the solution, test it
questions.explanation: The team is following a series of steps to identify the problem, gather requirements, design a solution, and implement the solution.
